checks.finding: All 6 tasks are high/critical matching their access-control/authorization surfaces (T-001/T-002 critical R-10 guard; T-003 cycle-limit; T-004 cross-model bypass; T-005 CI B2; T-006 Bash matcher B1). No over/under-classification.

Every high/critical task's Done When records Red->Green evidence and an independent quality-gate verdict; the two critical tasks (T-001, T-002) also record cross-model consensus and an HMAC-signed evidence bundle with a second distinct approver.

T-001's Done When has 9 distinct items (TEST-001/002/003/015, Red->Green, suite pass, quality-gate verdict, cross-model consensus, signed bundle + second approver), exceeding the 8-item oversized threshold, bundling four ACs incl. the orthogonal AC-015 ASCII check; the long heterogeneous checklist risks an implementer/reviewer overlooking one item.

Each functional task's mapped ACs include an edge/error-path scenario (T-001 forgery/short-circuit; T-002 bypass RED-first; T-003 prefix-collision/absent-dir; T-004 waiver-without-approval/lite-gate; T-005 no-PR vacuous; T-006 malformed fail-closed).
Project-specific test-type taxonomy matches each row's scope (unit/parity single module; integration 2+ components; cross-runtime parity across runtimes); every row is 1:1 mapped to an AC.
All 6 high/critical tasks carry an explicit Rollback field (re-copy prior protected file / revert commit).

T-003 and T-004 both list plugins/sdd-ship/skills/ship/SKILL.md in Planned Files for different edits (Step 4 cycle-limit vs cross-model/Field-Definitions/lite-gate), but neither Blockers references the other, risking one human-copy version overwriting the other's edits.

T-001->T-002 blocker is sound. A blocker is missing between T-003 and T-004: both modify ship/SKILL.md but declare Blockers: None with no ordering rule for the two independently staged human-copy edits (same root cause as SCOPE-DISJOINT).
T-002 (RED-first bugfix) satisfies reproduction symptom (cd && rm), root-cause diagnostic (substring match) before implementation, and regression evidence (TEST-004 RED->denied, TEST-005 parity).
